LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER LOUIS NITSOS' PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 3, 2010 BY ORDER OF THE COURT ON OCTOBER 20, 2010. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER LOUIS NITSOS' PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 4, 2011 AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DATE. THE PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION IS DUE FROM THE RESPONDENT ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 20, 2010 AND TO BE SUBMITTED IN ELECTRONIC FORM. THE OBJECTION FROM THE PETITIONER IS DUE ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 4, 2011 ALSO IN ELECTRONIC FORM. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER LOUIS NITSOS' PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 10, 2011 AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DATE. PETITIONER MAY FILE ANY OBJECTIONS OR COMMENTS PERMITTED BY THE RULE BY JANUARY 31, 2011 IN ELECTRONIC FORM. RESPONDENT MAY FILE OR ACT ON THE MODIFIED STATEMENT OF DECISION BY FEBRUARY 10, 2011. LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER LOUIS NITSOS' PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 14, 2011 AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DATE. THE COURT ORDERS RESPONDENT TO SUBMIT AN AMENDED PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION THAT CONFORMS WITH CCP 662 AND CRC 3.1590, NAMELY BY EXPLAINING THE FACTUAL AND LEGAL BASIS FOR THE COURT'S DECISION AS TO EACH OF THE PRINCIPAL DISPUTED ISSUES. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO SUBMIT ITS AMENDED PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION NO LATER THAN JANUARY 14, 2011. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
STATEMENT OF DECISION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER NITSOS MD, LOUIS TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID RESPONDENT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $370.00, (DENYING PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
